summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Custom Form Templates feature. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - FormTemplatesPage with system/custom templates, FormBuilder with drag & drop fields, CustomFormFiller with all field types, form saving, tree display, and PDF generation.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Backend /api/documentations/custom-forms POST now respects status parameter (was hardcoded to BROUILLON)
Backend correctly saves all field types including signature (base64 data URL)
Backend PDF generation includes all form fields and signature image
Frontend FormBuilder correctly implements drag & drop with @dnd-kit library
Frontend CustomFormFiller uses native canvas for signature (not react-signature-canvas)
File/Logo upload stores files locally in memory (not persisted to server) - as documented
seed_data_creation: Created test custom form 'TEST_Inspection_Zone_A' in Maintenance pole using 'Rapport d inspection' template
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom Form Templates feature fully tested. Key features verified: 1) FormTemplatesPage at /documentations/modeles shows system templates (Bon de travail, Autorisation particulière) and custom templates (Fiche de non-conformité, Rapport d inspection), 2) FormBuilder dialog allows creating templates with 10 field types (text, textarea, number, date, select, checkbox, switch, signature, file, logo), 3) Drag & drop reordering works, 4) PoleDetails form selection dialog includes custom templates, 5) CustomFormFiller renders all field types correctly including signature canvas, 6) Forms save with correct status (BROUILLON or VALIDE), 7) Saved forms appear in tree grouped by template, 8) PDF generation includes all fields and signature.

form_templates_page.test: Verify /documentations/modeles displays system and custom templates
form_templates_page.evidence: Screenshot shows 2 system templates (Bon de travail, Autorisation particulière) and 2 custom templates (Fiche de non-conformité with 0 fields, Rapport d inspection with 5 fields)

form_builder_dialog.test: Verify FormBuilder allows adding all field types
form_builder_dialog.evidence: Screenshot shows field type grid with 10 types, added 3 fields (Texte court, Date, Signature) with drag handles

form_selection_dialog.test: Verify form selection includes custom templates
form_selection_dialog.evidence: Screenshot shows dropdown with Bon de travail, Autorisation particulière, Fiche de non-conformité, Rapport d inspection

custom_form_filler.evidence: Screenshot shows 5 fields from Rapport d inspection: Zone inspectée (text), Date inspection (date), Résultat (select), Observations (textarea), Signature inspecteur (canvas)

signature_canvas.evidence: Screenshot shows drawn signature with 'Signature enregistrée' badge

form_save.evidence: Form 'TEST_Inspection_Zone_A' saved and appears in tree under 'Rapport d inspection' section

form_in_tree.test: Verify saved form appears in pole tree
form_in_tree.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Rapport d inspection' section with count 1, form entry with Edit/Print/Delete icons

pdf_generation.test: Verify PDF generation includes all fields
pdf_generation.evidence: API returns HTML with all field values and signature base64 image

api_form_templates_crud.evidence: 7 backend tests passed: get templates, create with fields, get by id, update, cannot modify system, cannot delete system, delete custom

api_custom_forms_crud.evidence: 7 backend tests passed: create, create with signature, get by pole, get by id, update, delete, generate PDF

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/form_templates_page_full.png - FormTemplatesPage with system and custom templates
.screenshots/field_type_grid.png - Field type selection grid with 10 types

bug_fix_applied.issue: Status was hardcoded to 'BROUILLON' ignoring form_data.status
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed to form_data.get('status', 'BROUILLON') to respect passed status
